meta.title: SD Light and Sound — Light · Sound · Experience
meta.description: Personal full-service partner for light, sound and experience. From quote to breakdown, one point of contact. Working across Belgium and beyond.

hero.slogan: From the first beam to the last note.
hero.sub: Your personal full-service partner for light, sound and experience — from quote to breakdown, one point of contact.

diensten.title: Everything for your event, in-house.
diensten.sub: From an intimate party to a 2000-person festival — light and sound, tightly handled.
diensten.extraBody: staging, cooling trailer, venue rental and drinks — we handle the full picture. Just ask.

over.title: SD is Stephan Dobos.
over.p1: Active in events since childhood — from small parties to big festivals — out of pure passion for light and sound.
over.p2: Not an anonymous company, but one driven craftsman who runs your event from start to finish. Personal, involved, and there in person.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: SD Light and Sound respects your privacy and processes personal data in line with the GDPR. This policy explains what we collect and why.

sections.p: SD Light and Sound (Stephan Dobos), De Pannelaan 73, 8660 De Panne. Contact: info@sdlightandsound.be.
Via the quote form: name, e-mail, event type, date and your message. We only collect what you enter yourself.
To answer your request, prepare a quote and contact you. We do not use your data for advertising.
Processing is based on your consent and on pre-contractual steps taken at your request.
We keep your data no longer than needed to handle your request and to meet legal obligations.
We never sell your data. A processor (e-mail provider) may be used to send messages, acting only on our behalf.
This website uses no tracking or advertising cookies. Only technically necessary functions are used.
You have the right to access, correct, delete and object. E-mail info@sdlightandsound.be. You may also lodge a complaint with the Belgian Data Protection Authority (www.dataprotectionauthority.be).

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.intro: Our terms and conditions will be published soon. Questions about a quote or booking? Contact us at info@sdlightandsound.be.
